growerp.website.WebsiteForm.title: Download the Free Guide
growerp.website.WebsiteForm.successMessage: Your Spreadsheet Freedom Playbook is on its way to your inbox.

growerp.landing.LandingPage.title: Stop Letting Spreadsheets Run Your Business
growerp.landing.LandingPage.headline: Stop Letting Spreadsheets Dictate Your Workday
growerp.landing.LandingPage.subheading: You've felt the pain of double-entry. You've seen the trend toward smarter, integrated systems. Now it's time to claim your prize — a clear, low-risk path to a unified business.

growerp.landing.PageSection.contentJson: [{"value":"5+","label":"Hours saved every week"},{"value":"0","label":"Extra staff needed"},{"value":"Real-time","label":"Stock & cash visibility"}]

growerp.landing.PageSection.sectionDescription: Three posts. One transformation. Here's what we covered — and what's waiting in your free guide.
A practical roadmap — no IT department required.
No fluff, no vendor pitch disguised as a guide. Just a practical, plain-English playbook written for SMB owners who are ready to stop firefighting data and start making decisions with confidence.
growerp.landing.PageSection.contentJson: [ {"icon":"📊","text":"Real-time stock & cash visibility from day one"}, {"icon":"✅","text":"Eliminate data entry errors permanently"}, {"icon":"⏱️","text":"Reclaim 5+ hours per week — immediately"}, {"icon":"📅","text":"End month-end chaos with automated reporting"}, {"icon":"🚀","text":"Scale without hiring extra back-office staff"} ]
